Ceres.effect: Increases Flush House hand value by +4 Mult and +40 Chips

Earth.effect: Increases Full House hand value by +2 Mult and +25 Chips

Eris.effect: Increases Flush Five hand value by +3 Mult and +50 Chips

Jupiter.effect: Increases Flush hand value by +2 Mult and +15 Chips

Mars.effect: Increases Four of a Kind hand value by +3 Mult and +30 Chips
Mars.notes: Upgrades Four of a Kind, not Three of a Kind.

Mercury.effect: Increases Pair hand value by +1 Mult and +15 Chips

Neptune.effect: Increases Straight Flush hand value by +4 Mult and +40 Chips

Planet X.effect: Increases Five of a Kind hand value by +3 Mult and +35 Chips

Pluto.effect: Increases High Card hand value by +1 Mult and +10 Chips

Saturn.effect: Increases Straight hand value by +3 Mult and +30 Chips

Uranus.effect: Increases Two Pair hand value by +1 Mult and +20 Chips

Venus.effect: Increases Three of a Kind hand value by +2 Mult and +20 Chips
